data.title: XChat Tops US App Store, Surpassing ChatGPT and Claude
data.description: XChat quickly ascended to the top position on the US App Store following its debut on iPhone, surpassing popular apps like ChatGPT and Claude. According to NS3.AI, X has announced that X Money, developed in collaboration with Visa, will be introduced soon after the messaging app's launch. Additionally, the company has indicated that support for cryptocurrency will be available at a later date.

data.title: Sources: Iran's stance is tougher than during the first round of negotiations.
data.description: Pakistani official sources said on the 25th that Iran adopted a tougher stance compared to the first round of negotiations, emphasizing that any solution to ending the war must be implemented according to Iran's conditions, not those proposed by US President Trump. (Xinhua)

data.title: FCA Cracks Down on Illegal Crypto Trading in London
data.description: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has collaborated with police and tax authorities to address suspected illegal peer-to-peer cryptocurrency trading activities in London. According to NS3.AI, the FCA visited eight locations across the city, issuing cease-and-desist letters at each site. The evidence gathered from these inspections is now aiding ongoing criminal investigations. Under the UK's Money Laundering Regulations, peer-to-peer crypto businesses that fall within the scope are required to register with the FCA before commencing operations.

data.title: Iran Adopts Firmer Stance in Peace Talks with Pakistan
data.description: Iran has taken a more assertive position in its negotiations with Pakistan, according to official sources from Pakistan on the 25th. According to Odaily, Iran emphasized that any resolution to end the conflict must adhere to its terms rather than those proposed by U.S. President Donald Trump.

data.title: Polymarket Data Suggests High Probability for MegaETH Market Cap Milestones
data.description: Polymarket's latest data reveals significant market expectations for MegaETH's launch. According to ChainCatcher, there is an 88% probability that MegaETH's fully diluted valuation (FDV) will exceed $1 billion one day after its launch. The likelihood of the market cap surpassing $600 million is 97%, $800 million is 93%, $1.5 billion is 56%, and $2 billion is 31%. Previous reports indicated that MegaETH might conduct its Token Generation Event (TGE) on April 30.

data.title: USDC Circulation Declines by 700 Million in a Week
data.description:
Circle has reported a decrease in the circulation of its USDC stablecoin by approximately 700 million over the past week ending April 23. According to ChainCatcher, Circle issued around 5.1 billion USDC while redeeming about 5.8 billion USDC during this period. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 78 billion.

Circle's reserves are approximately 78.2 billion USD, with overnight reverse repurchase agreements in U.S. Treasury securities accounting for about 47.2 billion USD. Additionally, U.S. Treasury securities with maturities of less than three months make up around 19.4 billion USD, deposits in systemically important institutions are about 11 billion USD, and other bank deposits total approximately 600 million USD.

data.title: AI's Impact on U.S. Employment: A Mixed Effect on Job Growth
data.description: Goldman Sachs economist Elsie Peng has assessed the influence of artificial intelligence on the U.S. labor market, noting a reduction in monthly payroll growth by approximately 16,000 jobs over the past year. According to NS3.AI, this development has contributed to a 0.1 percentage point increase in the unemployment rate. However, AI has also created around 9,000 jobs per month in sectors with high augmentation potential, such as education, judging, and construction management. Peng highlighted that the negative impact on employment has predominantly affected younger, less experienced workers in entry-level white-collar positions.

data.title: US media: Iran is open to negotiations with the US, but insists on its uranium enrichment rights.
data.description: According to the Wall Street Journal, a senior Iranian diplomat stated that Iran is open to negotiations with the United States but will not abandon its uranium enrichment activities. Iranian Ambassador to India, Mohammad Fatali, posted on social media on Saturday: "Negotiations can only yield proper results when our adversaries recognize our right to the peaceful use of nuclear energy." The report states that the United States is currently seeking a 20-year suspension of Iran's uranium enrichment program. (Jinshi)

data.title: Blockchain Rayls Welcomes Lagoon as First Partner
data.description: Blockchain platform Rayls has announced that Lagoon, an asset management infrastructure, has officially joined as its inaugural partner. According to Foresight News, Lagoon will provide vault infrastructure within the Rayls ecosystem, facilitating tokenized fund deployment, access control, fee management, and investor reporting capabilities.

data.title: BRICS Foreign Ministers Meeting in New Delhi Amid Iran Conflict Pressure
data.description: India is set to host the BRICS foreign ministers meeting in New Delhi on May 14–15, as the bloc faces increasing pressure to address the ongoing conflict involving Iran. According to NS3.AI, Iran has openly called on BRICS to take action, while India has maintained a stance focused on dialogue and diplomacy. The meeting will provide a platform for member countries to discuss their collective response to the situation, highlighting the geopolitical challenges faced by the group.

data.title: Brazil bans 27 prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Polymarket.
data.description: Brazilian authorities have blocked 27 prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Polymarket. Dario Durigan, Executive Secretary of the Brazilian Ministry of Finance, stated that Resolution No. 5.298 issued by the National Monetary Council will take effect in May. The new regulations classify contracts involving sports, politics, entertainment, or social events as gambling rather than financial investments. Currently, only contracts related to economic indicators such as inflation, interest rates, exchange rates, or commodity prices are permitted. Blocked platforms also include PredictIt, Robinhood's prediction function, and Fanatics Markets. Authorities stated that this move aims to prevent the increase of household debt and mitigate financial risks.

data.title: SEALCOIN launches early access campaign “Spacedrop”
data.description: According to the official announcement, SEALCOIN has officially launched its early access program, "Spacedrop," designed to provide users with the opportunity to participate in the SEALCOIN ecosystem before its full launch. Users can participate in platform interactions by completing tasks, earning points, and minting Soul-Bound Tokens (SBT), and learn about the protocol's operating mechanism through practical operation. SEALCOIN is reportedly an infrastructure-centric project that integrates satellite communication and blockchain technology, aiming to achieve secure and autonomous interaction between devices and digital services. By integrating hardware-level identity authentication and a global connectivity layer, the project aims to support real-world M2M (machine-to-machine) application scenarios across multiple industries.

data.title: Whale Wallets Withdraw Significant LINK from CEX
data.description:
On April 25, a whale wallet identified as "0x527" withdrew 370,631 LINK from a centralized exchange (CEX), according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. This transaction increased the wallet's total holdings to 565,612 LINK.

Another wallet, "0x526," also made a significant withdrawal from the CEX, extracting 125,999 LINK. These movements highlight notable activity among large cryptocurrency holders.

data.title: Two whales withdrew a total of $4.67 million worth of LINK from Binance.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, whale 0x527 (0x527...cAc2) withdrew 370,631 LINK from Binance, worth $3.48 million. It currently holds 565,612 LINK, worth $5.33 million. Additionally, whale 0x526 (0x526...cBd8) withdrew 125,999 LINK from Binance, worth $1.19 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Bear Market Bottom Predicted at $38,800 by Trader Killa
data.description:
Quantitative trader Killa shared insights on the potential bottom of the Bitcoin bear market on the X platform. According to ChainCatcher, Killa estimates the bottom to be around $38,800, with a possible deviation of approximately 5%, suggesting the bottom could be $40,740 or $42,680.

Previously, Killa used models such as cycle decrement analysis, pattern analysis, and a combination of mathematics and numerology to predict the bull market peak at $121,362, while the actual peak reached $126,100. He emphasized that even the highest predicted bottom of $42,680 is significantly lower than $60,000, making the latter a very optimistic bottom estimate. Killa plans to purchase as much spot Bitcoin as possible during July and August.

data.title: Zelensky: Ukraine is willing to hold peace talks with Russia in Azerbaijan if Russia is ready.
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy: Ukraine is willing to hold peace talks with Russia in Azerbaijan if Russia is prepared. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ukraine Open to Peace Talks with Russia in Azerbaijan
data.description: Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky has expressed willingness to engage in peace talks with Russia in Azerbaijan, provided that Russia is prepared for such discussions. According to Odaily, this statement comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations. The potential talks aim to address the conflict and seek a resolution.

data.title: Researchers cracked a 15-bit ECC key and received a 1-bit Bitcoin reward.
data.description: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli has been awarded the Q-Day Prize and one Bitcoin by quantum security startup Project Eleven for successfully cracking the encryption key protecting Bitcoin. Lelli used publicly available quantum hardware and a variant of Shor's algorithm to crack the 15-bit encryption key out of 32,767 possibilities. This quantum attack is 512 times more difficult than the 6-bit key record set in September 2025. Project Eleven CEO Alex Pruden stated that the resource requirements for such attacks are declining, and approximately 6.9 million Bitcoins are currently in vulnerable static addresses, including 1 million held by Satoshi Nakamoto. The Bitcoin network has proposed BIP-360 to introduce quantum-resistant address types, and platforms such as Ethereum, Ripple, and Tron have begun releasing plans to transition to post-quantum defenses.

data.title: XRP's Potential for Growth Supported by Technical and On-Chain Indicators
data.description:
XRP has experienced a significant rally, increasing by over 30% in the past three months, with technical and on-chain indicators suggesting further potential gains for the XRP/USD pair. According to Cointelegraph, several factors contribute to this optimistic outlook, including exchange outflows, positive whale flows, and strong demand for exchange-traded funds (ETFs).

As of Saturday, the XRP Ledger (XRPL) recorded nearly 35 million XRP in exchange outflows within 24 hours, marking the sixth-largest daily outflow of the year, as reported by Santiment. Such outflows often indicate that investors are transferring tokens to private wallets or custody, reducing the immediate supply available for sale. Historically, these spikes have preceded modest rallies in XRP's price. For instance, a similar spike in March led to a 20% rebound, while February's surge resulted in a 48% to 50% increase. These precedents suggest that the recent withdrawal spike could lead to higher XRP prices in May. Additionally, U.S.-based spot XRP ETFs have seen three consecutive weeks of net inflows, totaling approximately $82.88 million as of Saturday, according to SoSoValue data. This trend has pushed the total assets under management to $1.1 billion, indicating growing institutional interest in XRP products.

Positive whale flows further bolster the optimistic sentiment. Data from CryptoQuant reveals that XRP whale flows have turned positive, indicating that larger wallets are accumulating rather than distributing. The 90-day moving average of XRPL whale flows has returned to positive territory after being negative for much of early 2026. Historically, positive whale-flow regimes have preceded stronger XRP price trends, such as the rally from May to July 2025. This shift supports the broader accumulation narrative already evident in exchange outflows and ETF inflows.

XRP's technical structure also supports the potential for further gains. The XRP/USD pair has been trading within a falling wedge pattern for the past two years, characterized by two downward-sloping, converging trend lines. The recent rebound from the lower trend line support in April increases the likelihood of a move toward the upper boundary. This target zone aligns with the 50-week EMA and the 0.5 Fibonacci retracement near $1.87–$1.89, approximately 30% above current levels, by June. However, a decisive break below the wedge's lower trend line could invalidate the bullish narrative, potentially leading to a decline toward the $0.98 mark, aligning with the wedge's apex point and the 0.786 Fibonacci line.
